chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Suit No. B – 109 of 2013 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.9915/2023 (Urgency): 2. For orders on CMA No.9916/2023 (Withdrawal of suit): 11.07.2023: Mr. Hashmatullah, Advocate for the Plaintiff. Mr. Shahid Iqbal Rana, Advocate for the Defendant............. 1. Granted. 2. Counsel for the Plaintiff has moved this application for withdrawal of the suit. The Defendant Counsel has no objection. The same is allowed. The suit is disposed of as withdrawn with no orders as to cost. J U D G E
